Item.name: Nuqul ka mid ah qoraalka qaabaysan
Xir Dhammaan LAAKIIN Document-ga Hadda Jira
Ka saar khadadka nuqulka ah ee isku xiga
Kala soocida khadadka qaamuus ahaan kor u kaca
Kala sooc khadadka qaamuus ahaan soo degaya
Kala soocida Lex.Kor u kaca Iilow Dacwad
Kala soocida Lex.Ka Soo Degaya Dacwad Iilowsha
Kala soocida khadadka amarka deegaanka ee kor u kaca
Kala soocida laymanka Dalabka Maxaliga ah ee soo degaya
Kala soocida xariiqyada dhererka kor u kaca
Kala soocida laynka Dhererka soo degaya
U kala sooc xariiqyada sida is-goysyada kor u kacaya
U kala sooc xariiqyada sida is-goysyada u soo degaya
U kala sooc khadadka sida jajab tobanle (comma) kor u kaca
U kala sooc khadadka sida jajab tobanle (comma) soo degaya
U kala sooc khadadka sida jajab tobanle (dhibic) kor u kaca
U kala sooc xariiqyada sida jajab tobanle (dhibic) hoos u soo dhacaya
Ku Fur Faylka Ka Kooban Explorer
Iska Iilow Kiis Oo Dhan Erayga
Iska Iilow Kiis Oo Dhan Erayga
Ka noqo Xulashooyinka badan ee lagu daray
Ka bood hadda Tag Xiga Xulo badan
Ka jar hogaanka iyo booska raadraaca
Labadaba iyo EOL u goo meel bannaan
Ka saar khadadka madhan (oo ay ku jiraan xarfo madhan)
Geli Khadka Banaan Xagga Sare ee Hadda
Hoos Geli Khadka Banaan ee Hadda
Nuqul ka samee khadadka la calaamadeeyay
Dooro Dhammaan inta u dhaxaysa {} [] ama ()
U guuri si aad u bilowdo
Ka soo saar doorashada oo u beddel sabuuradda
Ka soo saar doorashada oo u beddel sabuuradda
Ka soo saar doorashada oo u beddel sabuuradda
Ka soo saar doorashada oo u beddel sabuuradda
Wax ka beddel Jidka Gaaban/Tirtir Macro...
Wax ka beddel Jidka Gaaban/Tirtir Taliska...
Dhererka nuxurka hoos u sii dhacaya
Wakhtiga wax laga beddelay ee kor u kacaya
Wakhtiga la bedelay ee soo degaya
Xir dhamaan LAAKIIN waa lagu dhejiyay
Ku Fur Faylka Ka Kooban Explorer
Ku Fur Faylka Ka Kooban cmd
Fur Folder ka kooban sidii goob shaqo
U guuri dib u warshadaynta bin
U guuri si aad u bilowdo
Isku beeg kelmada oo dhan kaliya
Ku beddel dhammaan dukumentiyada la furay
Dhammaan dukumentiyada la furay ka hel
Nuqul ka mid ah qoraalka calaamadeysan
⤵ Nuqul ka soo Hel oo Beddel
Nuqul ka beddelka si aad u hesho
Ma aad ka sii fogaan kartid:
Dooro faylasha si aad u dhaliso MD5...
Ula dhaqan xariiq kasta sidii xadhig gooni ah
Dooro faylasha si aad u dhaliso SHA-256...
Ula dhaqan xariiq kasta sidii xadhig gooni ah
Dooro faylasha si aad u dhaliso SHA-1...
Ula dhaqan xariiq kasta sidii xadhig gooni ah
Dooro faylasha si aad u dhaliso SHA-512...
Ula dhaqan xariiq kasta sidii xadhig gooni ah
Erayada muhiimka ah ee asalka ah
Ku qasbi midabka hore ee dhammaan noocyada
Ku qasbi midabka asalka dhammaan noocyada
Ku qasb doorashada xarfaha nooc kasta
Ku qasbi doorashada cabbirka farta ee dhammaan noocyada
Ku qasba doorashada geesinimada leh ee dhammaan noocyada
Ku qas doorashada farta taagta ah ee dhammaan noocyada
Ku qasbi inay hoosta ka xariiqaan doorashada dhammaan noocyada

ConflictInfoOk.name: Ma jiro khilaaf u dhexeeya shaygan

Item.name: Ku fur galka ka kooban Explorer
Ku fur gal ka kooban Command Prompt
U Beddelka EOL ee Daaqadaha (CR LF)
Style oo dhan adoo isticmaalaya qaabka 2aad
Style oo dhan adoo isticmaalaya qaabka 3aad
Qaabkii hore ee Hel Mark style
Habka Xiga ee Hel Mark style
Nuqul ka mid ah qoraalka qaabka 1aad
Nuqul ka mid ah qoraalka Qaabka 2aad
Nuqul ka mid ah qoraalka qaabka 3aad
Nuqul ka mid ah qoraalka qaabka 4aad
Nuqul ka mid ah qoraalka qaabka 5aad
Nuqul ka mid ah Qoraallada Habboon ee Dhammaan Qaababka
Nuqul ka samee qoraalka qaabaysan ee Hel qaabka Mark
Fiiri faylka hadda ku jira Chrome
Fiiri faylka hadda ku jira IE
U beddel Folderka sidii goob shaqo
U beddelo Folderka sidii goobta shaqada
Ku kala sooc Magaca A ilaa Z
Ku kala sooc Magaca Z una kala sooc A
Ku kala sooc Jidka A ilaa Z
Ku kala sooc Jidka Z ilaa A
Ku kala sooc Nooca A ilaa Z
Ku kala sooc Nooca Z ilaa A
Ku kala sooc dhererka nuxurka ee kor u kaca
Ku kala sooc dhererka nuxurka ee soo degaya
Tani waxay meesha ka saaraysaa habka gaaban ee amarkan
Luqadaha Qeexida Isticmaalaha ee khadka tooska ah
Isku laab laablaabi (laabi khadadka madhan sidoo kale)
Isku laablaabida qaabka 2 code (kala-soocida ayaa loo baahan yahay)
Qari (isticmaal furaha Alt ama F10 si aad u rogto)
Qari jidadka gaagaaban ee saxda ah ＋ ▼ ✕
Ku sawir bar midab leh tab firfircoon
Laba jeer guji si aad u xirto dukumeenti
Ka bax adigoo dhaw tabka ugu dambeeya
Ka dhig amarada laalaabida/furida heerka hadda taagan mid la beddeli karo
Dami sifada duubista horumarsan sababtoo ah taabasho taabasho
Daar u rogo wixii dhaafsiisan laynka u dambeeya
Hayso doorashada markaad midigta gujiso meel ka baxsan doorashada
Daar koobi/gooy khadka iyada oo aan la dooran
Codso midabka gaarka ah xagga hore ee qoraalka ee la xushay
U sahlo Xulashada Saadaasha Tafatirka badan
Ku codso dejinta muuqaalka C0, C1 Unicode EOL
Kahortagga xarfaha xakamaynta (C0 code) ku qorida dukumeenti
UTF-16 Big Endian oo leh BOM
UTF-16 Little Endian oo leh BOM
Codso faylasha ANSI ee la furay
Had iyo jeer fur dukumeenti cusub marka lagu daro bilowga
U isticmaal xariiqda koowaad ee dukumeentiga sida magaca tab aan ciwaan looga dhigin
Tusaha Faylka Furan/Kaydi ee ugu tala galay
Xusuusnow hagaha ugu dambeeyay ee la isticmaalo
Fur dhammaan faylalka galka halkii aad ka soo saari lahayd Folder-ka oo ah goobta shaqada ee galka soo dhacaya
Fadlan ka bax Nextpad++ oo dib u billow Nextpad++ qaabka maamulka si aad u isticmaasho sifadan.
Ka dhig liiska luqadda mid is haysta
Ula dhaqan dib-u-dhac ku yimaadda sifo baxsad ah oo loogu talagalay SQL
Furaha gadaasha dambe oo aan leexleexan halkii meel kaliya laga saari lahaa
Isku beeg kelmada oo dhan kaliya
Isku beeg kelmada oo dhan kaliya
Adeegso farta monospaced ee Raadi wada hadalka (Waxa loo baahan yahay in dib loo bilaabo Nextpad++)
Soo hel wada hadalku wuu furan yahay raadinta ka dib kaas oo ka soo baxa daaqada natiijooyinka
Beddel: Ha u guurin dhacdadan soo socota
Daaqadda Natiijooyinka Raadinta: tus hal gelid oo keliya xariiq kasta oo la helo haddii ay suurtagal tahay
Buuxi goobta ka hel qoraal la xushay
Dooro kelmad ku hoos jirta daryeelka marka aan waxba la dooran
Baaxadda ugu yar ee si toos ah u hubinta "Xulashada":
Buuxi ka hel Goobta Hagaha faylalka ku salaysan Document Firfircoon
: Calaamadaha ugu badan ee si otomaatig ah u buuxinaya goob ka soo xulashada
Daar sawirka fadhiga iyo kaabaynta xilliyeedka
Soo kicinta dib u habeynta wax ka bedel kasta
Xusuusnow casharka hadda la bilaabayo soo socda
Xusuusnow galalka aan la geli karin ee fadhigii hore
U sahlo dhamaystirka otomaatiga ah wax galinta kasta
Si kooban uga dhig liiska dhammaystirka tooska ah
Halbeegyada shaqada waxay tilmaan ka bixinayaan gelinta
Ku fur kalfadhi tusaale cusub (oo si toos ah u kaydi fadhiga markaad baxdo)
Had iyo jeer ku jira qaabka tusaalooyinka badan
* Wax ka beddelka goobtan wuxuu u baahan yahay inuu dib u bilaabo Nextpad++
Dib u celi nidaamka wakhtiga taariikhda caadiga ah (qaabab gaaban oo gaaban)
Xasuusnoow gobolka (gudku wuu furan yahay) xaalado kale (qaabka tusaalaha badan) ama markaad isticmaalayso cabbirka xariiqda taliska [-sanka]
Delimiter settings settings (Ctrl + Mouse double click)
U adeegso liiska xarfaha ereyga caadiga ah sida uu yahay
Ku dar dabeecadaada qayb ka mid ah ereyga (ha dooran ilaa aad garanayso waxaad samaynayso)
Daar xaddidaadda Faylka Weyn (ma muujinayo syntax)
Allow si toos ah u dhameystir
Cadaadis digniinta marka la furayo faylasha ≥2GB
Goobaha isku xirka la gujin karo

Element.name: U sahle dhammaan faylasha la furay
Wax tallaabo ah oo ku saabsan

Item.name: Xaaladda Faylka si toos ah u-helidda
U rog xariiqda ugu dambeysa cusbooneysiinta ka dib
Ku muuji magaca kaliya ee bar cinwaanka
Si otomaatig ah u baadh xarfaha codaynta
Awood Save All xaqiijin wada hadalka
Ka raadi kaliya khadadka la helay
Isku beeg kelmada oo dhan kaliya

Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad kaydiso dhammaan dukumentiyada la beddelay?
Dooro "Haa had iyo jeer" haddii aadan rabin inaad mar kale aragto wada hadalkan. Waxaad dib u hawlgelin kartaa wada-hadalkan gudaha Dookhyada dambe.
Ku koobbi macluumaadka khaladka kaabis sabuuradda
Majiraan kayd git\nIsticmaal Baadh si aad u furto repo.
Faylka fadhiga la doortay kuma jiro tabs
Dubi makro marka hore adoo isticmaalaya Bilow Duubista.
Muuji dariiqa faylka oo buuxa ee bar cinwaanka
Ma jiro khilaaf u dhexeeya shaygan
Dib u bilow arjiga si aad ugu shubto plugins-yada la rakibay.
Ku qor si aad u raadiso\u2026
Aan awoodin in la hubiyo wixii ku soo kordha
Tani waxay tirtiri doontaa faylasha plugin
Qor oo kaydi makro marka hore.
Qoraal calaamadeysan oo lagu koobiyeeyay sabuuraddii
Ma jiro qoraal calaamadeysan oo la koobi karo
Ku beddel Mashaariicda: Weli kuma xidhna.
Ka hel Mashaariicda: Weli kuma xidhna liiska faylka Gudida Mashruuca.
Dami qoraalka la xushay ee jiidaya
Laba-guji si aad u xirto tab
Xusuusnow muuqaalka guddida fadhiyada oo dhan
Gelida galitaanka maqnaanshaha fadhiga ku hayso
Beddel: ha u guurin dhacdada xigta
Isticmaal farta monospaced gudaha Raadi wada hadalka
U beddelo nidaamka taariikhda/wakhtiga caadiga ah
Adeegso falanqaynta liiska hawlaha ku salaysan XML
Dooro faylka Nextpad++ mawduuca XML si aad u codsato
Qiimayaasha kala duwani waa inay ahaadaan 0-255 bilawguna waa inuu noqdaa <= dhamaad.
Dib u bilow Nextpad++ si aad dib ugu soo kiciso macnaha guudMenu.xml.
Faylku wuxuu leeyahay isbeddello aan la kaydinDib u soo dejinta codaynta cusub ayaa meesha ka saaraysa.Sii wad?
Wax jawaab ah kama helin server-ka
Kaydka ayaa laga yaabaa inuu yahay mid gaar ah.
Faylasha luqadaha dheeriga ah (.xml) waxaa lagu dhejin karaa:
Nooca si aad wax u raadiso…

ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.title: Tafatirka macnaha guud
ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.message: Tafatirka macnaha guudMenu.xml wuxuu kuu ogolaanayaa inaad wax ka beddesho Nextpad++ menu-ka soo baxay. Waa inaad dib u bilowdo Nextpad++ kaaga si aad u dhaqan gasho ka dib markaad wax ka beddesho contextMenu.xml.

SaveCurrentModifWarning.title: Keydso wax ka beddelka hadda
SaveCurrentModifWarning.message:
Waa inaad kaydisaa wax ka beddelka hadda. Dhammaan isbeddellada la badbaadiyey lama celin karo.
Sii wad?

LoseUndoAbilityWarning.title: lumin Digniin Kartida
LoseUndoAbilityWarning.message:
Waa inaad kaydisaa wax ka beddelka hadda. Dhammaan isbeddellada la badbaadiyey lama celin karo.
Sii wad?

CannotMoveDoc.title: U dhaqaaq Nextpad++ cusub
CannotMoveDoc.message: Dukumeentiga waa la bedelay, kaydi ka dibna isku day mar kale.

DocReloadWarning.title: Dib u soo celi
DocReloadWarning.message: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad dib u soo dejiso faylka hadda jira oo aad lumiso isbeddelada lagu sameeyay Nextpad++?

FileLockedWarning.title: Badbaadinta fashilantay
FileLockedWarning.message: Fadlan hubi haddii faylkan lagu furay barnaamij kale

FileAlreadyOpenedInNpp.message: Faylka mar hore ayuu ku furmay Nextpad++.

RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.title: Magacaabista waa guuldareystay
RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.message: Magaca la cayimay ayaa horey loogu isticmaalay tab kale.

RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.title: Magacaabista waa guuldareystay
RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.message: Magaca la cayimay ma noqon karo madhan, ama kuma koobnaan karo boos(no) ama TAB(yada).

NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.title: Qadarka faylasha la furayo aad bay u badan yihiin
NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.message: $INT_REPLACE$ files are about to be opened. Are you sure you want to open them?

SettingsOnCloudError.title: Dejinta Cloud
SettingsOnCloudError.message: Waxay u muuqataa in dariiqa dejinta ee daruurtu ay ku qotonto darawal akhrin kaliya, ama gal gal loo baahan yahay xaq u lahaanshaha qoraalka gelitaanka. Dejintaada daruuraha waa la tirtiri doonaaFadlan dib u deji qiimaha isku xiran adoo isticmaalaya wada hadal doorbid.

FilePathNotFoundWarning.title: Faylka Furan
FilePathNotFoundWarning.message: Faylka aad isku dayayso inaad furto ma jiro.

SessionFileInvalidError.title: Waa La Soo Rari Karaa Kulanka
SessionFileInvalidError.message: Faylka fadhiga ama wuu xumaaday ama ma ansaxayo.

DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.title: Ficil aan sax ahayn
DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.message: Waxaad kaliya tuuri kartaa faylal ama faylal laakiin labadaba maaha, sababtoo ah waxaad ku jirtaa inaad u dejiso Folderka qaabka Mashruuca. Waa inaad awood u yeelataa "Fur dhammaan faylalka galka halkii aad ka bilaabi lahayd Folderka ahaan goobta shaqada ee galka la soo ridayo" ee qaybta "Default Directory" ee wada hadalka dookhyada si hawshani u shaqeyso.

SortingError.title: Khaladka Kala Soocida
SortingError.message: Aan awoodin in la sameeyo kala-soocidda tirooyinka sababta oo ah line $INT_REPLACE$.

SortLocaleMultiple.title: Kala soocida lama samayn
SortLocaleMultiple.message: Kala soocida xulashooyin badan lama taageero

SortLocaleUnknown.title: Kala Soocida Waa Fashilmay
SortLocaleUnknown.message: Sababta kala-soocidda u fashilantay lama go'aamin karo.

ColumnModeTip.title: Tilmaanta Habka Tiirka
ColumnModeTip.message:
Waxaa jira 3 dariiqo oo loo beddelo habka column-door:
1. (Keyboard iyo Mouse) Qabo Alt intaad bidix-riix jiidid
2. (Keyboard-ka kaliya) Qabo Alt+Shift markaad isticmaalayso furayaasha fallaadha
3. (Keyboard ama Mouse) Dhig daryeelka bilawga la rabo ee booska xannibaadda tiirka, ka dib fuliya amarka "Begin/End Select in Column Mode"; U dhaqaaq daryeelka ilaa dhammaadka la rabo ee booska xannibaadda tiirka, ka dib fulinta "Bilow/Dhammaadka Xulashada Qaabka Tiirka" mar labaad

BufferInvalidWarning.title: Badbaadinta fashilantay
BufferInvalidWarning.message: Lama kaydin karo: Buffer waa sax.

DoCloseOrNot.title: Hayso faylka aan jirin
DoCloseOrNot.message: Faylka "$STR_REPLACE$" hadda ma jiro. Faylkan ku hay tafatiraha?

DoDeleteOrNot.title: Tirtir faylka
DoDeleteOrNot.message: Faylka "$STR_REPLACE$" waxaa loo rari doonaa qashinka dib u warshadaynta, dukumeentigana waa la xidhi doonaa. Sii wad?

NoBackupDoSaveFile.title: Keydso
NoBackupDoSaveFile.message: Faylkaaga kaydinta lama heli karo (dibadda ayaa laga tirtiray). Keydso haddii kale xogtaadu way lumi doontaa Ma rabtaa inaad kaydiso faylka "$STR_REPLACE$" ?

DoReloadOrNot.title: Dib u soo celi
DoReloadOrNot.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Faylkan waxa wax ka beddelay barnaamij kale. Ma rabtaa inaad dib u soo dejiso?

DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.title: Dib u soo celi
DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Faylkan waxa wax ka beddelay barnaamij kale. Ma rabtaa inaad dib u soo dejiso oo aad lumiso isbeddelada lagu sameeyay Nextpad++?

PrehistoricSystemDetected.title: Nidaamka taariikhiga hore ee la ogaaday
PrehistoricSystemDetected.message: Waxa ay u muuqataa in aad wali isticmaasho nidaam taariikhi ka hor ah.Habkaani wuxuu ku shaqeeyaa kaliya nidaam casri ah, raali ahaada

XpUpdaterProblem.title: Nextpad++ Updater
XpUpdaterProblem.message: Nextpad++ updater kuma habboona XP sababtoo ah lakabka amniga gaboobay ee hoos yimaada XP. Ma rabtaa inaad tagto Nextpad++ bogga si aad u soo dejiso noocii ugu dambeeyay?

GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.title: Settings Proxy
GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.message: Fadlan dib u billow Nextpad++ qaabka maamulka si aad u habayso wakiilka.

DocTooDirtyToMonitor.title: Dhibaatada la socodka
DocTooDirtyToMonitor.message: Dukumeentigu waa wasakh.Fadlan kaydi wax ka beddelka ka hor intaadan la socon.

DocNoExistToMonitor.title: Dhibaatada la socodka
DocNoExistToMonitor.message: Faylku waa inuu jiraa si loola socdo

FileTooBigToOpen.title: Dhibaatada cabbirka faylka
FileTooBigToOpen.message: Faylku aad buu u weyn yahay in la furo Nextpad++

FileLoadingException.title: Koodhka ka baxsan: $STR_REPLACE$
FileLoadingException.message: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la soo shubayay faylka!

WantToOpenHugeFile.title: Furitaanka digniinta faylka weyn
WantToOpenHugeFile.message: Furitaanka fayl weyn oo 2GB+ ah waxay qaadan kartaa dhowr daqiiqo. Ma rabtaa inaad furto?

OpenFileNoFolderError.title: Lama furi karo faylka
OpenFileNoFolderError.message: "$STR_REPLACE1$" lama furi karo: Folder "$STR_REPLACE2$" ma jiro.

FileBackupFailed.title: Kaydinta Faylku wuu Fashilmay
FileBackupFailed.message:
Nooca hore ee faylka laguma kaydin karo hagaha kaydinta ee "$STR_REPLACE$".
Ma rabtaa inaad kaydiso faylka hadda jira si kastaba?

LoadLangsFailed.title: Isku xidhka
LoadLangsFailed.message: Load langs.xml waa guuldareystay! Ma rabtaa inaad dib u soo ceshato langs.xml?

FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.title: Folder sida goobta shaqada oo ku daraya dhibaatada gal
FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.message: Fayl-hoosaad galka aad rabto inaad ku darto ayaa jira. Fadlan ka saar xididka guddiga ka hor intaadan ku darin galka "$STR_REPLACE$".

ProjectPanelChanged.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelChanged.message: Goobta shaqada waa la bedelayMa doonaysaa inaad badbaadiso?

ProjectPanelSaveError.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelSaveError.message: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii aad qoraysay faylkaaga goobta shaqada. Goobtaada shaqada lama keydin

ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Goobta shaqada ee furan
ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: Goobta shaqada ee hadda jirta waa la bedelayMa rabtaa inaad kaydiso mashruuca hadda?

ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Goobta Shaqada Cusub
ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: Goobta shaqada ee hadda jirta waa la bedelayMa rabtaa inaad kaydiso mashruuca hadda?

ProjectPanelOpenFailed.title: Goobta shaqada ee furan
ProjectPanelOpenFailed.message: Goobta shaqada waa la furi waayay Waxay u muuqataa in faylka la furay aanu ahayn fayl mashruuc sax ah.

ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.title: Ka saar faylka mashruuca
ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.message: Dhammaan walxaha hoose waa laga saari doonaa Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad faylkan ka saarto mashruuca?

ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.title: Ka saar faylka mashruuca
ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.message: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad faylkan ka saarto mashruuca?

ProjectPanelReloadError.title: Dib u soo rar goobta shaqada
ProjectPanelReloadError.message: Lama heli karo faylka dib loo soo dejiyo

ProjectPanelReloadDirty.title: Dib u soo rar goobta shaqada
ProjectPanelReloadDirty.message: Goobta shaqada ee hadda jirta waa la bedelayDib-u-dejinta waxay tuuraysaa dhammaan wax ka beddelka Ma rabtaa inaad sii wadato?

UDLNewNameError.title: Khaladka UDL
UDLNewNameError.message: Magacan waxaa isticmaala luqad kale, fadlan mid kale sii.

UDL_saveBeforeImport.title: Luqadda Qeexay Isticmaalaha
UDL_saveBeforeImport.message: Kahor intaadan dhoofin, keydi qeexida luqadaada adigoo gujinaya "Save As..." badhanka.

SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.title: Ma hubtaa?
SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.message: Ma hubtaa in aad rabto in aad tirtirto jidkan gaaban?

FindCharRangeValueError.title: Dhibaatada Qiimaha Kala Duwan
FindCharRangeValueError.message: Waa inaad ku qortaa inta u dhaxaysa 0 iyo 255.

OpenInAdminMode.title: Badbaadinta fashilantay
OpenInAdminMode.message: Faylka lama kaydin karo oo waa la ilaalin karaa Ma rabtaa inaad ku bilowdo Nextpad++ qaabka maamulka?

OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.title: Badbaadinta fashilantay
OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.message: Faylka lama kaydin karo oo waa la ilaalin karaa Ma rabtaa inaad ku bilowdo Nextpad++ qaabka maamulka?

OpenInAdminModeFailed.title: Ku fur qaabka maamulka waa fashilmay
OpenInAdminModeFailed.message: Nextpad++ laguma furi karo qaabka maamulka

ViewInBrowser.title: Eeg faylka hadda ku jira browserka

ExitToUpdatePlugins.title: Nextpad++ wuxuu ku dhow yahay inuu baxo
ExitToUpdatePlugins.message: Haddii aad HAA gujiso, waxaad joojin doontaa Nextpad++ si aad u sii waddo hawlaha. Nextpad++ dib ayaa loo bilaabi doonaa kadib marka dhamaan hawlgalada la joojiyo. Sii wad?

NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.title: Nextpad++ waxa uu u baahan yahay in dib loo bilaabo
NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.message: Waa inaad dib u bilowdo Nextpad++ si aad ugu shubto plugins aad rakibtay.

ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.title: Nextpad++ waxa uu u baahan yahay in dib loo bilaabo
ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.message: Waa inaad dib u bilowdo Nextpad++ si aad awood ugu yeelato Beddelka Taariikhda.

WindowsSessionExit.title: Nextpad++ - Ka bixida fadhiga Windows
WindowsSessionExit.message: Kalfadhiga Windows waa la joojin doonaa laakiin waxaad haysaa xog aan la keydin.Ma rabtaa inaad hadda ka baxdo Nextpad++?

LanguageMenuCompactWarning.title: Liiska luuqadaha is haysta
LanguageMenuCompactWarning.message: Doorashadan waxa la beddeli doonaa bilowga soo socda.

SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.title: $STR_REPLACE$
SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.message: Isbeddellada aan la keydin ayaa qarka u saaran in la tuuro! Ma rabtaa inaad kaydiso isbeddelladaada ka hor inta aanad mawduucyada baddalin?

MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.title: Waafaqsanaanta amarrada Macro iyo socodsiinta
MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.message:
Amarradaada Macro iyo Run ee ku kaydsan Nextpad++ v.8.5.2 (ama ka weyn) waxaa laga yaabaa inaysan la socon nooca hadda ee Nextpad++. Fadlan tijaabi amarradaas oo, haddii loo baahdo, dib u tafatir.
Haddii kale, waxaad hoos ugu dhigi kartaa Nextpad++ v8.5.2 oo aad dib u soo celin kartaa xogtaadii hore. Nextpad++ waxa ay kaydin doontaa "shortcuts.xml" hore oo u kaydinaysa "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup". Magacaabida "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup" -> "shortcuts.xml", amarradaada waa in la soo celiyaa oo si sax ah u shaqeeyaan.

FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.title: Badbaadinta fashilantay
FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.message: Ma kaydin karo faylka Nextpad++ buuxa ee wax-akhriska-kaliya ee kaydinta habka mamnuuca ah waxay ka hortagtay in faylka la kaydiyo.

NotEnoughRoom4Saving.title: Badbaadin way ku guuldareysatay
NotEnoughRoom4Saving.message: Ku guuldareystay inuu kaydiyo faylka Waxay u muuqataa inaysan jirin meel ku filan saxanka si loo kaydiyo faylka.Faylkaaga lama kaydin

FileInaccessibleUserSession.title: Faylka lama heli karo
FileInaccessibleUserSession.message:
Faylasha qaarkood fadhigaaga gacanta lagu kaydsado "$STR_REPLACE$" lama heli karoWaxaa loo furi karaa dukumeenti madhan oo akhrin kaliya sida meel-haysayaal.
Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad abuurto boos-hayeyaashaas?
FIIRO GAAR AH: Doorashada inaan la abuurin meel-hayeyaasha ama xidhidh dambe, fadhigaaga gacanta lagu kaydiyo waxba ma beddeli doono markaad baxdo.

FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.title: Faylka lama heli karo
FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.message:
Qaar ka mid ah faylasha fadhigii hore lama geli karoWaxaa loo furi karaa dukumeenti madhan oo akhrin kaliya sida meel-haysayaal.
Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad abuurto boos-hayeyaashaas?
FIIRO GAAR AH: Doorashada inaan la abuurin meel-hayeyaasha ama xidhidh dambe, fadhigaaga waxa wax laga beddelayaa marka laga baxo!Waxaan kuu soo jeedinaynaa in aad hadda kaydiso "session.xml".

RTLvsDirectWrite.title: Ma socon karo RTL
RTLvsDirectWrite.message: RTL kuma habboona habka DirectWrite.Fadlan dami qaabka DirectWrite ee MISC.qaybta Dookhyada dialog, oo dib u bilow Nextpad++.

FileMemoryAllocationFailed.title: Marka laga reebo: Qoondaynta xusuusta faylka waa fashilantay
FileMemoryAllocationFailed.message: Waxay u badan tahay in aanay jirin xasuus bilaash ah oo ku filan faylka uu ku raran yahay Nextpad++.

FindRegexBackwardDisabled.title: Dib u baadhida Regex waa naafo
FindRegexBackwardDisabled.message:
Sida caadiga ah, dib-u-raadinta regex waa naafo sababtoo ah natiijooyin lama filaan ah oo suurtagal ah.Si aad u sameyso raadinta gadaal, fur furka Raadinta oo dooro qaabka raadinta caadiga ah ama la dheereeyey halkii aad ka ahaan lahayd mid caadi ah. Riix badhanka OK si aad u furto Raadinta wada hadalka ama u dejiso diiradda.
Haddii aad u baahan tahay qaabka raadinta regex gadaal, kala tasho buug-gacmeedka adeegsadaha si aad u hesho tilmaamo awood u leh.

FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.title: Digniin raadinta
FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.message: Xaaladda sanduuqa hubinta "In xulashada" si toos ah ayaa wax looga beddelay. Fadlan xaqiiji xaalada raadinta ka hor inta aanad samayn falka.

Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.title: Nextpad++ waxa uu u baahan yahay in dib loo bilaabo
Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.message: Nextpad++ waxa uu u baahan yahay in dib loo bilaabo si loo tuso menu-gaabyada saxda ah.

NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.title: Beddelka faylka sifada akhrinta-keliya waa guuldarraystay
NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.message: Fadlan ku socodsii Nextpad++ maamule ahaan si aad u bedesho sifooyinka faylka.

PreferencesInitialSort.name: Kala sooci hawlaha (A ilaa Z) si caadi ah

SelectFolderFromBrowserString.name: Dooro gal si aad ugu darto Folderka ahaan goobta shaqada

Item.name: Dib u soo rar goobta shaqada

word-chars-list-tip.value: Tani waxay kuu ogolaanaysaa inaad ku darto xarfo dheeraad ah xarfaha erayga hadda jira adigoo laba jeer gujinaya xulashada ama raadinta "Isku dhig dhammaan kelmad kaliya" ikhtiyaar la hubiyay.

eol-custom-color-tip.value: Tag Qaab-dhismeedka Qaabka si aad u bedesho midabka caadiga ah ee EOL ee caadiga ah ("EOL custom color")..

backup-select-folder.value: U dooro galka sidii hagaha kaydinta

cloud-restart-warning.value: Fadlan dib u bilow Nextpad++ si aad u dhaqan gasho.

cloud-select-folder.value: Ka dooro gal meesha Nextpad++ ku akhrido/qorto dejintiisa

default-open-save-select-folder.value: U dooro galka sida hagaha caadiga ah

shift-change-direction-tip.value: Isticmaal Shift+Enter si aad u raadiso jihada ka soo horjeeda

find-in-files-filter-tip.value:
Ka hel cpp, cxx, h, hxx hpp: *.cpp *.cxx *.h *.hxx *.hpp
Ka hel dhammaan faylasha marka laga reebo exe, obj log: *.* !*.exe !*.obj !*.log
Ka hel dhammaan faylasha laakiin ka saar imtixaanada galka, bin bin64: *.* !\tijaabooyin !\bin*
Soo hel dhammaan feylasha laakiin ka saar dhammaan galka ama diiwaannada si isdaba joog ah: *.* !+\log*

find-in-files-select-folder.value: Ka dooro gal aad ka raadinayso

find-in-files-dir-from-active-doc-tip.value: Buuxi goobta hagaha ku salaysan dukumeenti firfircoon

find-status-top-reached.value: Soo hel: Dukumeenti la gaarey oo bilaabmaya, dhacdadii ugu horeysay ee hoosta ayaa la helay.

find-status-end-reached.value: Soo hel: Dhammaadka dukumeentiga la gaarey, dhacdadii ugu horreysay ee ka timid xagga sare ayaa la helay.

find-status-replaceinfiles-1-replaced.value: Ku Bedel Faylasha: 1 dhacdo ayaa la bedelay

find-status-replaceinfiles-nb-replaced.value: Ku beddel faylasha: $INT_REPLACE$ dhacdooyinka waa la bedelay

find-status-replaceinopenedfiles-1-repla.value: Ku beddel faylasha Furan: 1 dhacdo ayaa la beddelay

find-status-replaceinopenedfiles-nb-repl.value: Ku beddel faylasha la furay: $INT_REPLACE$ dhacdooyinka waa la bedelay

find-status-invalid-re.value: Soo hel: Odhaah joogto ah oo aan sax ahayn

find-status-replaceall-1-replaced.value: Bedel Dhammaan: 1 dhacdo ayaa la bedelay

find-status-replaceall-nb-replaced.value: Beddel Dhammaan: Dhacdooyinka $INT_REPLACE$ waa la bedelay

find-status-replaceall-readonly.value: Bedel Dhammaan: Lama beddeli karo qoraalka.Dukumeentiga hadda jira waa la akhriyaa kaliya

find-status-replace-end-reached.value: Beddel: Dhammaadka dukumeentiga la gaarey, kor ayuu ka bilaabmay.

find-status-replace-top-reached.value: Beddel: Dukumeenti la gaarey oo bilaabmaya, hoos ayuu ka bilaabmay.

find-status-replaced-next-found.value: Beddel: 1 dhacdo ayaa la bedelay.Dhacdadii xigtay waa la helay.

find-status-replaced-next-not-found.value: Beddel: 1 dhacdo ayaa la bedelay.Dhacdooyin dambe lama helin

find-status-replace-readonly.value: Beddel: Ma beddeli karo qoraalkaDukumeentiga hadda jira waa la akhriyaa kaliya

find-status-cannot-find.value: Soo hel: Lama heli karo qoraalka "$STR_REPLACE$"

find-status-cannot-find-pebkac-maybe.value: Dhacdada la siiyay lama heli karo.Waxaa laga yaabaa inaad illowday inaad hubiso "ku soo duuduubo" (to ON), "Kiiska isku midka ah" (OFF), ama "Ku dar kelmadda oo dhan" (OFF).

find-status-scope-backward.value: laga bilaabo bilawga faylka ilaa daryeelka

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat.value: Jilayaasha aan la arki karin ee la dhejiyay "Raadi waxa" ama "Ku beddel" nuxurka

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat-tip.value: Digniin: Jilayaasha aan la arki karin ee goob raadinta (ama beddelka) Qoraalka lagu dhejiyay goobtan waxaa ku jira xarfo aan la arki karin (laga yaabee in xariiq- dhammaan).Haddii aad sii waddo adoon tirtirin, waxaa lagu dari doonaa raadinta (ama beddelka) qoraalka.

finder-copy.value: Nuqul ka mid ah khadadka la xushay

userdefined-title-rename.value: Dib u Magacaabi Magaca Luuqadda Hadda

replace-in-files-confirm-directory.value: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad bedesho dhammaan dhacdooyinka:

replace-in-projects-confirm-message.value: Ma rabtaa inaad bedesho dhammaan dhacdooyinka ku jira dhammaan dukumeentiyada ku jira guddiga mashruuca ee la doortay?

replace-in-open-docs-confirm-message.value: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad bedesho dhammaan dhacdooyinka dukumeentiyada furan?

find-result-title-info-extra.value: - Qaabka shaandhaynta khadka: kaliya muuji natiijooyinka la sifeeyay

session-save-folder-as-workspace.value: U keydi galka sidii goob shaqo

IncrementalFind-FSTopReached.value: La gaarey bogga sare, laga sii waday hoosta

IncrementalFind-FSEndReached.value: Dhammaadka bogga la gaarey, oo kor laga sii waday

largeFileRestriction-tip.value:
Tilmaamaha qaarkood ayaa laga yaabaa inay hoos u dhigaan waxqabadka faylalka waaweyn.Tilmaamahan si toos ah ayaa loo dami karaa marka la furo faylka weyn.Waxaad iyaga ku habayn kartaa halkan.
FIIRO GAAR AH: 1. Wax ka beddelka xulashooyinka halkan waxay u baahan tahay dib u fur faylal waaweyn oo hadda furmay si loo helo hab-dhaqan habboon.
2. Haddii "Deactivate Word Wrap globally" la eego oo aad furto fayl wayn, "Word Wrap" waxa uu noqon doonaa naafo dhammaan faylasha.Waxaad dib-u-hawlgelin kartaa iyada oo loo marayo menu "View->Word Wrap".

npcNote-tip.value:
Matalaadda "non-ASCII" ee la doortay iyo jilayaasha aan daabicin (control).
FIIRO GAAR AH: Isticmaalka matalaadda waxay baabi'in doontaa saamaynta qoraalka.
Si aad u hesho liiska buuxa ee meelaha cad ee la doortay iyo xuruufta aan daabicin, hubi Buugga Isticmaalaha.
Guji badhankan si aad u furto degelka buug-gacmeedka.

npcAbbreviation-tip.value:
Soo gaabinta : magac NBSP: meel aan jabin ZWSP: meel ballac eber ah ZWNBSP : Eber-ballac meel aan jabin
Si aad u hesho liiska oo dhan hubi Buugga Isticmaalaha. Guji "?"badhanka midigta ku yaal si aad u furto bogga internetka oo leh Buugga Isticmaalaha.

npcCodepoint-tip.value:
Codepoint : magac U+00A0: meel aan nasasho lahayn U+200B: meel ballac eber ah U+FEFF : Eber-ballac meel aan jabin
Si aad u hesho liiska oo dhan hubi Buugga Isticmaalaha. Guji "?"badhanka midigta ku yaal si aad u furto bogga internetka oo leh Buugga Isticmaalaha.

npcCustomColor-tip.value: Tag qaabeeyaha Style si aad u bedesho midabka caadiga ah ee goobta cad ee la xushay iyo xuruufta aan daabacin ("midabka xarfaha aan daabacin").

npcIncludeCcUniEol-tip.value: Codso jaangooyooyinka muuqaalka xarfaha aan daabacin ee C0, kantaroolka C1 iyo Unicode EOL (khadka xiga, kala soocida xarriiqda iyo cutubka cutubka).

searchingInSelThresh-tip.value: Tirada ugu yar ee jilayaasha la xushay ee aagga wax ka beddelka si aad si toos ah u hubiso "In xulashada" sanduuqa hubinta marka la furo wadahadalka.Qiimaha ugu badan waa $INT_REPLACE$.U deji qiimaha 0 si aad u joojiso hubinta tooska ah.

searchingFillFindWhat-tip.value: Tirada ugu badan ee jilayaasha la doortay ee aagga wax ka beddelka si ay si toos ah u buuxiso goobta "Raadi maxaa" marka Ctrl-F la kiciyo.Qiimaha ugu badan waa $INT_REPLACE$, taas oo ah cabbirka ugu badan ee "Raadi waxa" goobta, oo xaddidan nidaamka.

verticalEdge-tip.value: Ku dar calaamadeeyaha tiirkaaga adoo ku tilmaamaya booskiisa nambar jajab tobanle ah.Waxaad qeexi kartaa dhowr calaamadood oo tiirar ah adoo isticmaalaya meel cad si aad u kala saarto tirooyinka kala duwan.

fileSaveAsCopySaveButton-tip.value: Qabo Shift markaad riixdo Save si aad u furto nuqulka ka dib markaad kaydiso.

autoIndentBasic-tip.value: Hubi in galitaanka xariiqda hadda jirta (ie, xariiqda cusub ee la sameeyay iyadoo la riixayo furaha ENTER) uu la mid yahay dhexda xariiqii hore.

autoIndentAdvanced-tip.value:
U sahle gelida caqliga leh ee luuqadaha "C-like" iyo Python.Luuqadaha "C-like" waxaa ka mid ah: C, C++, Java, C #, Ujeedo-C, PHP, JavaScript, JSP, CSS, Perl, Rust, PowerShell iyo JSON.
Haddii aad dooratid hab horumarsan laakiin aadan wax ka beddelin faylasha luqadaha aan soo sheegnay, galitaanka wuxuu ahaan doonaa qaabka aasaasiga ah.

global-override-tip.value: Awood-siinta "Global override" halkan waxay burin doontaa cabbirka dhammaan noocyada luqadda.Waxa aad u badan tahay inaad runtii rabto waa inaad isticmaasho "Style Default" beddelka

scintillaRenderingTechnology-tip.value: Waxa laga yaabaa inay horumariso samaynta jilayaasha gaarka ah ama ay xalliso arrimaha garaafyada qaarkood, dib u bilaw Nextpad++ si loo dabaqo isbeddelada.

toolbar-accent-tip.value: Doorashadani waxay ka dhigaysa summadaada aaladaha inay raacaan midabka lahjadda nidaamka Windows.Midabka lahjadda waa midabka iftiiminta ee loo isticmaalo badhamada, xuduudaha, iyo muraayadaha menu-ka bilow ee Windows.Si aad u bedesho, aad Settings > Personalization > Colors, ka dibna dooro midabka lahjadda aad door bidayso.

len-limit-exceeded-tip.value: Xadka dhererka ayaa dhaaftay: gelintaada waxa laga yaabaa inay dhaafto xadka la ogolyahay oo waa la gooyay, lamana kaydin doono casharka xiga.

max-len-on-search-tip.value: Wax gelintaadu waxa laga yaabaa inay dhaafto xadka la ogol yahay oo waa la gooyn karayay, lamana kaydin doono casharka xiga.

max-len-on-save-tip.value: Dhererka gelintaadu aad bay u dheer tahay waxaana laga yaabaa inaan lagu kaydin fadhigaaga xiga.

tabbar-tabcompactlabellen-tip.value: Waxay xaddidaysaa dhererka muuqda ee magacyada tab dheer.Geli si aad u dabaqdo qiimaha la siiyay.Qiyaasta qiimaha: 1-257 xaraf (0 waxay joojinaysaa goynta).
